Home› Services
Practice Areas

How We Serve Our Clients

From active breach response to long-term security transformation — we deliver outcomes, not deliverables. Every engagement is led by senior practitioners with Fortune 50 pedigree.

Primary Capabilities
Digital Forensics & Incident Response

Our flagship practice. When crisis strikes, we provide rapid containment, meticulous forensic investigation, and litigation-ready evidence preservation.

i.

Incident Response & Breach Containment

Rapid emergency response to stop active attacks and secure compromised environments. 24/7 availability.

Explore Service →
ii.

Ransomware Response & Recovery

Negotiation advisory, decryption, and secure restoration of critical business systems affected by ransomware.

Explore Service →
iii.

Data Breach Investigation

Determine what data was compromised, how the breach occurred, and produce defensible forensic documentation.

Explore Service →
iv.

Cloud Incident Response

Cloud-native IR across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Microsoft 365. Rapid containment of cloud intrusions and identity compromise.

Explore Service →
v.

Business Email Compromise (BEC)

Trace fraudulent wire transfers, identify compromised accounts, and prevent future BEC attacks.

Explore Service →
Legal & Litigation
Attorney & Court Support

Privileged forensic investigation, expert testimony, and defensible documentation for law firms and legal proceedings.

i.

Breach Attorney Support

Privileged forensic investigation and technical expertise for law firms navigating complex cyber litigation.

Explore Service →
ii.

Expert Witness Testimony

Credible, clear, and defensible technical testimony for litigation, arbitration, and regulatory proceedings.

Explore Service →
iii.

Divorce Digital Forensics

Device analysis, communication recovery, asset discovery, and evidence preservation for family law proceedings.

Explore Service →
iv.

OSINT & Online Investigation

Open-source intelligence gathering, digital footprint analysis, and pre-litigation research.

Explore Service →
Proactive Defense
Blue Team & Managed Services

Continuous security operations to harden your environment and detect threats before they become breaches.

i.

SOC Transformation & Optimization

Design, build, and optimize Security Operations Centers with Fortune 50 methodology.

Explore Service →
ii.

Security Operations Consulting

Strategic SOC program design, staffing, and optimization that delivers measurable outcomes.

Explore Service →
iii.

Detection Engineering

Custom detection rules, SIEM tuning, and MITRE ATT&CK-aligned alert development.

Explore Service →
iv.

SIEM Optimization & Deployment

Expert management across Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel, Elastic, and Chronicle platforms.

Explore Service →
v.

Managed Detection & Response (MDR)

24/7 monitoring, threat hunting, and incident escalation by U.S.-based analysts.

Explore Service →
vi.

Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR)

Managed EDR across CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Microsoft Defender, and Carbon Black.

Explore Service →
vii.

24/7 Security Monitoring

Continuous human-led threat detection across endpoints, network, and cloud environments.

Explore Service →
viii.

Threat Intelligence & Hunting

Adversary-focused intelligence and proactive threat hunting from a Fortune 50 intelligence veteran.

Explore Service →
ix.

Proactive Threat Hunting

Hypothesis-driven threat hunting aligned to MITRE ATT&CK, identifying adversaries before automated detection.

Explore Service →
x.

Dark Web Monitoring

Continuous surveillance of dark web marketplaces for compromised credentials and exposed data.

Explore Service →
xi.

Virtual CISO (vCISO)

Executive-level security leadership, board reporting, strategy, and security program development.

Explore Service →
Adversary Simulation
Red Team & Offensive

Identifying vulnerabilities before adversaries do.

i.

Penetration Testing

Network, application, and cloud penetration testing to identify exploitable vulnerabilities.

Explore Service →
ii.

Red Team Operations

Full-scope adversary simulation including physical and social engineering attack chains.

Explore Service →
iii.

Phishing & Social Engineering

Realistic phishing campaigns and vishing attacks to measure human security awareness.

Explore Service →
iv.

APT Threat Assessment

Security posture evaluation against nation-state and advanced criminal adversaries.

Explore Service →
Regulatory & Federal
Compliance & Government

Compliance programs built by practitioners who understand both the frameworks and the technical reality.

i.

CMMC 2.0 Compliance

End-to-end CMMC Level 2 and Level 3 readiness, gap remediation, and pre-assessment preparation.

Explore Service →
ii.

NIST 800-171 Implementation

Protecting Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) and meeting DFARS requirements.

Explore Service →
iii.

ITAR Compliance

Cybersecurity compliance for defense and aerospace handling export-controlled technical data.

Explore Service →
iv.

Defense & Government Advisory

Strategic cybersecurity guidance for the defense industrial base. Raytheon and Fortune 50 experience.

Explore Service →
v.

FedRAMP Advisory

Authorization support for cloud service providers serving federal agencies.

Explore Service →
vi.

General Compliance & Risk

Security audits, gap analysis, and compliance readiness across multiple frameworks.

Explore Service →
vii.

SOC 2 Readiness

Type I and Type II readiness consulting, control implementation, and audit preparation.

Explore Service →
viii.

ISO 27001 Implementation

ISMS implementation, risk assessment, and certification audit preparation.

Explore Service →
ix.

HIPAA Security Compliance

Security Rule assessment, technical safeguard implementation, and breach notification preparation.

Explore Service →
Personal & Executive
Personal Cybersecurity

Concierge digital protection for high-value individuals, executives, and families.

i.

Personal Digital Forensics

Device analysis, account compromise investigation, and evidence preservation for individuals.

Explore Service →
ii.

Executive & Personal Security

Account hardening, device forensics, stalkerware detection, and privacy management for C-suite.

Explore Service →
iii.

Executive Cybersecurity Protection

Comprehensive personal cybersecurity for board members and high-net-worth individuals.

Explore Service →
iv.

Account Compromise & Recovery

Rapid response for hacked accounts, identity theft, SIM swaps, and unauthorized access.

Explore Service →
v.

Privacy Hardening & Data Removal

Data broker removal, digital footprint reduction, and personal information scrubbing.

Explore Service →
Partnerships
Partner Programs

Revenue-sharing programs for IT providers, MSPs, and trusted advisors.

i.

White Label Cybersecurity for IT/MSPs

Deliver enterprise-grade cybersecurity under your brand. We operate behind the scenes while you own the client relationship.

Learn More →
ii.

Cybersecurity Referral Partnerships

Revenue-sharing referral program for IT providers, MSPs, attorneys, and trusted advisors.

Learn More →
